generateWalletsDialog.title: Generate Wallets - Security Notice
generateWalletsDialog.message1: You can create wallets through offlinelana.org or right here. You need to be aware that these are generated on your computer, which is online, whereas on offlinelana.org this is done when your computer is offline.
generateWalletsDialog.message2: Everything depends on your internal security posture. If you feel you need to protect yourself, use offlinelana.org, otherwise do it here and simplify your life 🙂
generateWalletsDialog.message3: The responsibility is in your hands.
generateWalletsDialog.message4: By clicking "Generate", 8 new wallets will be created and automatically filled in the form. A PDF document with all wallet information and QR codes will be generated for secure storage.

whatIsLana.title: What is Lana?
whatIsLana.question1: How can 100 euros become 100 million euros?
whatIsLana.question2: A utopian idea or a real possibility?
whatIsLana.description: The video presents a simple concept of long-term growth through Lana8Wonder — where a small initial step, time, and collaboration create an exponential effect. It's not about quick profits, but about understanding the flow of money and shared value.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Lana8Wonder is a way or decision to join the community of registered Lana holders with awareness/acceptance of certain rules and self-responsibility. Your investment grows with the growth of the network, through patient collaboration, not speculation. Let's see what the L8W creator says:
faq.a2: The investment is one-time – it's 100 EUR. We can say it's accessible to everyone. The amount is divided into 8 accounts, intended for long-term network and consequent wealth growth – without ongoing costs and complicated management.
faq.a3: Registered Lanas are Lanas that are the result of the work of Lana creators, Lana knights, or their contribution to LanaCoin. The value of registered Lana is fixed and doubles with each split. Buying registered Lanas is the fastest and simplest way to participate in the Lana world.
faq.a4: Unregistered Lanas can be purchased on exchanges - just like other cryptocurrencies. Interested in more? kriptovalute.si | plan15.online. Join our workshops held on a weekly basis.
faq.a5_intro: You're in the right place: lana8wonder.com
faq.q6: 6. I successfully created/published a plan in Lana8W. What now?
faq.a6_intro: Wait for a new split. You can explore (and participate in) the Lana world by entering
faq.a6_wif: . Your WIF (private key) of the main wallet is the ticket to this and more...
faq.a6_workshop: A workshop will be organized, follow announcements on Mejmosefajn.org and – play...
